name: Bluestem Oral Care Chicken Flavored Dog & Cat Dental Water Additive
description: Oral hygiene never tasted so delicious with bluestem Oral Care Chicken Flavor Dog and Cat Water Additive! This daily water additive helps protect your fur-iend’s teeth, and has the added bonus of an enticing chicken flavor. The additive is made with special coactiv+ technology, a unique formulation that helps to break down the biofilm where harmful bacteria can multiply on your pal’s teeth and cause bad breath. With 100% food-grade ingredients, it’s safe for daily use to help fight plaque and tartar, freshen breath, and promote good oral hygiene—with a tasty flavor, to boot!
